summary: Round 2: tech-spec passes template-compliance and task-quality validation with zero findings. Both round-1 cosmetics are fixed: Decision 7 now has an 'Alternatives considered' line; Task 3 'Files to read' uses the full docs/features/... path. New Decisions 8 (application_name=noisia) and 9 (no Conninfo in logs) both follow the Decision + Rationale + Alternatives considered format. Frontmatter valid (created YYYY-MM-DD, status=draft, branch filled, size=M). All template sections present and non-empty. Tasks are brief scope statements with no AC/TDD/how-to/line-number leakage; technical decisions stay in the Decisions section. Skills valid (code-writing, documentation-writing, pre-deploy-qa); reviewers are all standard catalog agents and exist on disk. Time-free wave ordering preserved; Final Wave (Task 4 Pre-deploy QA) intact. Wave conflict check clean: Task 1 touches backendkiller/* only, Wave 2 splits cmd/* (Task 2) vs README.md (Task 3) with no overlap, Task 4 modifies nothing; dependencies respect wave order, no cycles. Task count = 4 (<=15). Standards consistent with architecture.md (one package per workload) and patterns.md (no-hyphen package name, db-interface access, context-only stop, Conninfo never logged).
